svg.text: Orbit-density contrast in the logistic map
At r = 4 the chaotic invariant measure piles up near the edges. In a period-3 window the mass collapses onto a few bands.
empirical histogram plus exact invariant density
period-3 window: the orbit keeps revisiting a few narrow bands

text.tspan: blue bars = long-run histogram from 50,000 iterates
the mass collapses into a few spikes because
the orbit falls into a period-3 window
